scripts.test:visual: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -v $(cd .. && pwd):/work -w /work/astro mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.0-noble bash -c 'HOME=/tmp npx playwright test'
scripts.test:visual:update: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -v $(cd .. && pwd):/work -w /work/astro mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.0-noble bash -c 'HOME=/tmp npx playwright test --update-snapshots=all'
